task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Mazda CX-5 (Vehicle). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $28770.00 and wholesale is $21360.00. Product features: Compact crossover with premium feel and i-Activ AWD. Reference: https://www.mazdausa.com/vehicles/cx-5

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Mazda CX-5. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Mazda CX-5. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
